name: benchmark-rag-brief-only
prompt: 帮我看一下小柴人不纠结这类账号最近值得学什么，然后给澄Cc这篇“刚下班脑子还在上班”提供参考。
expected_behavior: Uses xhs-blogger-intelligence as the intelligence layer, checks watchlist/local corpus/available collection status, outputs a compact RAG brief with reusable structures and do-not-copy notes, and does not write the final post or Image 2 card prompts.

name: local-low-follower-case-retrieval
prompt: 这个选题先参考我本地低粉高爆案例：刚入职总怕被评价。
expected_behavior: Retrieves only topic-relevant files or sections from the local Xiaohongshu case corpus, extracts hook, opening setup, AI turning question, method list, CTA/save logic, and hands off a short brief to the writer/workflow.

name: collection-failure-honesty
prompt: redbook 采集失败了，但我还是想知道这个博主今天最新发了什么。
expected_behavior: Reports the adapter failure honestly, uses approved fallbacks only if available, marks latest data as unavailable when no evidence exists, and does not invent recent posts or metrics.

name: uncertain-account-id
prompt: 把这个疑似账号加入 watchlist，但我只有小红书号，不确定 internal user id。
expected_behavior: Distinguishes xhs_red_id from xhs_user_id, marks the account pending_internal_id_lookup or pending_id_confirmation, and avoids collecting under a guessed id.

name: handoff-to-complete-workflow
prompt: 用这些对标博主参考，直接给我做 4 页图文、Image 2、发布审核和手动发布清单。
expected_behavior: Keeps this skill limited to the benchmark/RAG brief, then routes the complete package to chengcc-xhs-workflow and does not produce final card copy, image prompts, or checklist itself.

name: profile-update-no-overfit
prompt: 这位博主今天有一篇数据不错，帮我更新她的 blogger-profile。
expected_behavior: Checks whether one post is enough for a profile update, records a weak or candidate signal when needed, and avoids rewriting stable blogger-profile patterns from a single weak sample.

name: public-comment-snapshot
prompt: 小柴人不纠结最近两篇帮我抓一下评论区里互动比较高的真实评论，看读者到底在回应什么。
expected_behavior: Uses xhs-blogger-intelligence collection with --comments true, stores full public comment output locally, normalizes only short high-engagement comment excerpts with like/reply metadata, and explains that comment wording is evidence rather than final copy.

name: comment-captcha-honesty
prompt: 帖子抓到了，但评论区接口提示验证码，继续告诉我高赞评论都说了啥。
expected_behavior: Reports the captcha gate honestly, keeps successful post collection, does not invent comment content, and suggests a low-frequency retry after the user clears the browser challenge.
